debug_info.goal:
x : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird
fond_Kx :
  EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K
      (EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x) =
    EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x
⊢ EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x = x

proof:
have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using this
failed_attempts:
have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ (K ◁ x) = (K ◁ x) := by
        simpa [Introduction.response] using fond_Kx
      have : K ◁ x = x := by
        calc
          K ◁ x = (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ (K ◁ x) := by
            symm
            simpa using (K.call (K ◁ x) (K ◁ x))
          _ = K ◁ x := h
          _ = x := by
            simpa using (K.call x (K ◁ x))
      simpa [this]

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [Introduction.response] using congrArg (fun b => b ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h.symm

have h1 : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by simpa [h1]
      have hx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by simpa [K.call]
      have hx' : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by simpa [hx] using h2.symm
      simpa [K.call] using hx'

have hkxx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) := by
        simpa [fond_Kx] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using hkxx

have hkx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx] using congrArg (fun b => b ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using hkx

have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) := by
        simpa [Introduction.response] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by
        simpa [Kestrel.K.call] using h1
      have hx : K ◁ x = x := by
        simpa [Kestrel.K.call] using h2
      simpa [hx]

have hk : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ (K ◁ x) = (K ◁ x) := by
        simpa [Introduction.response, fond_Kx]
      have hx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ (K ◁ x) = x := by
        simpa [Kestrel.K.call]
      exact hx ▸ hk

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have hkx : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) := by
        symm
        exact K.call (K ◁ x) (K ◁ x)
      have hkx' : K ◁ x = K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) := by
        calc
          K ◁ x = K ◁ (K ◁ x) := by symm; exact K.call x (K ◁ x)
          _ = K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) := by simpa [h] using hkx
      have hx : x = K ◁ x := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x := by simpa using (K.call (K ◁ x) x).symm
          _ = (K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x))) ◁ x := by simpa [hkx'] 
          _ = K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) := by simpa using (K.call (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) x)
          _ = K ◁ x := by
            have : (K ◁ (K ◁ (K ◁ x))) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by
              simpa using (K.call (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) x)
            simpa using this.symm
      simpa [hx] using hx.symm

have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) := by
        simpa [fondness] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h1
successful_attempts:
have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using this

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx]
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h := congrArg (fun b => b ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have hk : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) = (K ◁ x) := fond_Kx
      have hx : ((K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x) = ((K ◁ x) ◁ x) := congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) hk
      simpa [K.call] using hx

have hx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx]
      simpa [K.call] using hx

have hkx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) = (K ◁ x) := fond_Kx
      have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [hkx]
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h := congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have hkx : (K ◁ x) = x := by
        have := congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
        simpa [K.call] using this
      simpa [K.call, hkx] using fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx]
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h := congrArg (fun z => z ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) = (K ◁ x) := fond_Kx
      have h' : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := congrArg (fun b => b ◁ x) h
      simpa [K.call] using h'

have h1 : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h1]
      simpa [K.call] using h2

have hk : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [Introduction.response] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using hk

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) = (K ◁ x) := fond_Kx
      have hx : ((K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x) = ((K ◁ x) ◁ x) := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using hx

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx]
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [fond_Kx] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h := congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using this

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [Introduction.response] using congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) fond_Kx
      simpa [K.call] using h

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have hx : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using hx

have h : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) = (K ◁ x) := fond_Kx
      have hk : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using hk

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        simpa [h]
      simpa [K.call] using this
